summary: Complete redesign testing of FomoFam black/white glassmorphism. All 15 backend tests pass. All UI sections verified with new design. Hero section with 3D globe, dark map explore, community (coming soon), organizers, reputation, event types (8 cards), footer all load correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid='coming-soon-*' selectors not found via playwright - visually the badges ARE rendering correctly (confirmed via screenshot). The testid may use a different naming convention.
Waitlist form submitted successfully (API confirmed working) but [data-testid='waitlist-success'] not found after submission. Either different testid or success state renders in different element.
data-testid='event-type-card-*' not found via playwright selector but 8 cards visually render correctly in screenshot. Testid naming may differ.

issues: Footer shows '© 2025 FomoFam' but current year is 2026 - minor outdated year

action_items: Update footer copyright year from 2025 to 2026
Verify data-testid attributes on CommunitySection coming-soon badges, waitlist success state, and EventTypesSection cards for future playwright tests
critical_code_review_comments: Coming soon badge testids and event type card testids may be missing or named differently than expected

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all sections render correctly, minor testid discrepancies, 1 cosmetic year issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete redesign verified: Hero (3D globe working, floating glass cards, pure black background, white text), Navbar (glass/transparent, all nav links, Sign In + Get Started), Explore (dark CartoDB map, filter tags x9, glass event cards with funding progress), Create Events (escrow milestone tracker, progress bar, 3-step indicators visible), Community (6 cards all with Coming Soon overlays + Q2 2026 badge, waitlist form), For Organizers (3 pain cards: Sponsors Ghost/Low-Quality Attendees/Not Enough Funding + Start Organizing CTA), Reputation (3 profile cards visible in dark glass), Event Types (8 cards in 4x2 grid), Footer (FomoFam logo, nav links, social icons, email waitlist, Powered by Agastya Labs). Auth modal: dark glass, Sign In/Get Started tabs, Google OAuth, email+password forms all work. Register + Login flow verified. Backend 100% passing.
rca_of_issue: Minor testid selector mismatches for coming-soon badges and event type cards - cosmetic testing issue only, UI renders correctly per screenshots
